chapter_title.ar: بَابُ حَقِّ الْمُؤْمِنِ عَلَى أَخِيهِ وَ أَدَاءِ حَقِّهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 75 – The rights of the Momin upon his brother and the fulfilling of his rights

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/33)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/33)
text: مَا عُبِدَ اللَّهُ بِشَيْ‏ءٍ أَفْضَلَ مِنْ أَدَاءِ حَقِّ الْمُؤْمِنِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Jameel, from Murazim,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Allahazwj has not been worshipped with anything more superior than the fulfilling of the rights of the Momin’.
en.sarwar: 4. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from Jamil from Marazim from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Allah the best way to worship is to fulfil (protect) the rights of the believer.”
